title: The Benchmark
author: Zachary Proser
description: Trace an AI benchmark score from sampled tasks through prompts, scorers, aggregation, uncertainty, contamination, and the decision it can support.

blueprint.subject: EVALUATION
blueprint.eyebrow: Score provenance · Measurement validity · Complete working drawing
blueprint.subtitle: A leaderboard number is the output of a measurement pipeline built to support a particular decision.
rfiSuggestions: Can I trust a leaderboard ranking?
How do I evaluate a model for my own use case?
